data.name: 娛樂圈疑雲-S號房事件
data.detailed_description:
◆特色系統

　◇在環境設定裡能打開全CG模式,自由瀏覽HCG

　◇無壓力操作設計-快速的文字跳轉系統

陳若夏為了調查多年前的一場火災而進入新聞社，卻陰錯陽差被捲進了娛樂圈的潛規則風暴；而在那背後隱藏著的，是更加醜陋的真相……在這混亂黏膩的泥沼裡，究竟能全身而退，還是就此耽溺於慾望之中，無法自拔？

◆故事


一場大火奪去了我的雙親和幸福童年，唯一留下的，只有火場裡一塊寫著「宸宇新聞」的燒焦皮革。
為了調查火災背後的真相，我努力活了下來，多年後的我終於得到進入宸宇新聞的機會，前提是我必須去調查影視界的當紅小花旦——蘇念「自殺」的真相。

「如果想成為妳的偶像蘇念，就要體驗一遍她經歷過的事情。」

當我越靠近蘇念身邊的人，就越是驚訝於娛樂圈這個大染缸的骯髒程度。
道貌岸然的星探，不懷好意的經紀人，位高權重的娛樂圈大佬……一個個都用有色眼光打量著我，要求我用身體「支付報酬」換取機會。
而神祕的app「S號房」、奇異的紫色液體「soul lose」等，似乎都在拼湊著蘇念死亡的真相。
蘇念究竟都經歷了些什麼？而這和宸宇新聞以及當年的大火間又有什麼關係？

為了在這慾望的沼澤中收集線索，我究竟該隨之沉淪，或是還有其它的抉擇……？

◆玩法


主線劇情中有多次選項，每一次的選擇都將影響最終的結局。
而隨著劇情發展將逐步開啟可探索區域，主角在前往主線指定地點前的早上可以選擇【思考】現況、檢視目前收集到的【物品】、前往其它地點【探索】、或【休息】直接進行主線劇情，在過程中逐步收集「真相線索」，拼湊出完整的真相。

◆遊戲特色


◇16張基本CG，包含差分180張以上
◇遊戲文字8萬字
◇一位主要女角，兩位次要女角
◇推理劇情向、娛樂圈潛規則題材遊戲
◇遊戲結局：5種（含處女通關結局）

data.supported_languages:
繁體中文, 英文, 法文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 俄文, 日文*, 泰文, 簡體中文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 韓文, 土耳其文, 越南文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 512 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Dark Secrets of Showbiz
data.detailed_description:
◆Featured Systems

◇Full CG mode can be turned on in the environment setting, and HCG can be freely browsed.
◇Pressure-Free Operation Support one-click mouse operation-Fast text-to-text system

◆Story


A fire took away my parents and my happy childhood. The only thing it left me was a piece of charred leather, discovered in the fire, with the words "Chen-Yu News" written on it.
I managed to survive in order to find out the truth behind the fire. Years later, I finally got the opportunity to join Chen-Yu News, provided that I would investigate the truth behind the ‘suicide’ of Su Nian, one of the most popular young actresses in the film industry.

“If you want to become your idol Su Nian, you have to experience what she has gone through.”

The closer I got to the people around Su Nian, the more I was amazed at how dirty the entertainment industry was.
The sanctimonious scouts, the malicious agents, and the powerful senpais of the industry...everyone looked at me with greedy eyes and demanded that I “pay” with my body in exchange for opportunities.
The mysterious app “Room S”, the strange purple liquid “soul lose”, etc., all seemed to be piecing together the truth of Su Nian's death.
What had Su Nian gone through? And what did this have to do with Chen-Yu News and the fire in my childhood?

To gather clues in this swamp of desire, should I rot with it, or was there other choices...?

◆Gameplay Instructions


There are multiple options in the main storyline and each choice will affect the final ending.
As the plot develops, explorable areas will gradually open up. The protagonist can choose to [Think] about the current situation, to [Examine] the items she has collected, to [Explore] another location, or to [Take a break] to proceed directly to the main plot in the morning before heading to the designated location. In the process, she gradually collects ‘clues to the truth’ and pieces together the whole story.

◆Game Features


◇16 basic CGs, including more than 180 differentials
◇Game text: 80,000
◇One main female character and two secondary female characters
◇Deduction and the unspoken rules in the entertainment industry themed game
◇Game endings: 5 types (including a ‘virgin’ ending)

data.short_description: In her attempt to solve the mystery of her parents’ death, Chen Ruoxia is accidently drawn into the storm of unspoken rules in the entertainment industry. Hiding behind it is a truth even uglier... In this showbiz world surrounded by dark secrets and conspiracies, will she be able to escape with the truth or will she become their next...
data.supported_languages:
Traditional Chinese, English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Japanese*, Thai, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America, Korean, Turkish, Vietnamese
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 512 MB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
